research_question: 在 10-cohort 合同下（turnover 已降至 0.199，feasibility 已验证），加入 retain50 daily-recheck refresh rule，能否在保持 turnover <= 0.25 和 invested_weight >= 0.30 的前提下，改善 return/IR/drawdown 和 cost_stress？
change_detail: 在 10-cohort 合同下，将 refresh rule 从 full refresh 改为 daily-recheck retain_if_rank_leq=50。每日检查 rank，rank <= 50 的持仓保留，其余替换。不改变：score family、TopK(10)、执行语义、成本合同、基准、持仓提取规则、purge gap、样本资格矩阵、流动性 guard、holding_cohort_count(10)、cash retention/no-replacement。

portfolio_refresh_contract.target_weight_rule: Equal-weight across currently held names after refresh; unfilled slots remain cash.
portfolio_refresh_contract.semantic_note: Daily-recheck retention. Rank checked every signal_date. Incumbents with rank <= 50 are retained. Rank > 50 or outside guard/entry-tradeable are replaced. This is the same retain_if_rank_leq=50 semantics as exploratory_retain50_c1, now applied under 10-cohort contract.

serial_rule: Refresh rule 在 10-cohort 合同下的最终验证。只允许 1 个候选。如果 retain50 + 10-cohort 仍无法通过 9 gates，portfolio_refresh_rule 方向正式关闭。
